tda_parameters.threshold_range: 5th-95th percentile of nu per field, interpolated to common grid
tda_parameters.common_grid_method: mean of 5th/95th percentiles over 50 fiducial fields

patch_note: Cache aggiornata da phase1_patch_cache.py (Phase 2 Sessione 1). Feature estratte con pipeline identica a Phase 1 (n_thresh=50, sigma=0.64px, log(delta+1), superlevel_via_negation). I risultati di Gate 1 non sono modificati.
